ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Your account statement
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Singh,

We are writing to inform you that a transaction of ₹5,000 was made from your account at 10:23 AM on 06-04-2026. The transaction was to XYZ Store, Mumbai. If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately at 1800-123-456 or visit <URL> to secure your account.

Thank you for choosing Reliance Bank.

Regards,
Reliance Bank Support

spam.subject: Urgent: FedEx Delivery Fee Payment Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

This is to inform you that your FedEx shipment (Tracking No. 123456789) was not delivered due to an outstanding delivery fee of ₹200. To proceed with the delivery, please pay the fee within 48 hours by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Failure to pay within the deadline will result in cancellation of the shipment and possible return of the package.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
FedEx India Customer Support
